description: A security flaw has been discovered in PHPGurukul Beauty Parlour Management System 1.1. This affects an unknown part of the file /admin/invoices.php. Performing a manipulation of the argument delid results in sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.
